title: Coinbase for Agents: Automating portfolio trading with AI
slides: Can AI manage your crypto trades in real time?
It watches 20+ coins simultaneously without sleep.
But it acts only when your pre-set rules trigger.
They finally stop chasing pumps and reacting late.
Set one rule today—test it for 24 hours.
thread_text:
1. Can AI time your trades?

It watches 20+ coins at once, nonstop.

2. No sleep, no emotion.

It only moves when your rules trigger.

3. You stop chasing pumps.

No more reacting late to market spikes.

4. The twist: you control it.

Pre-set rules decide every action, not hype.

5. Set one rule today.

Test it for 24 hours on live crypto data.
video_script: It only trades when you say.
No more chasing pumps or panic.
You set the rules, it executes.
Test one rule for twenty-four hours.

script: It only trades when you say.
No more chasing pumps or panic.

instagram.caption:
Your crypto portfolio can now run itself on 24/7 autopilot. 🎯

Coinbase launched a feature that lets AI agents monitor 20+ coins at once—no sleep, no emotions. It only executes trades when the rules you set are triggered. No more late reactions to pumps or panic sells.

You stop chasing hype and start following logic you pre-defined. 🔄

What’s the first rule you’d set to protect your portfolio tonight?

carousel_slides.description: AI watches 20+ coins nonstop, but only acts on your preset rules, not hype.
Your AI agent monitors 20+ coins simultaneously and trades only when your rules trigger.
Pre-set rules prevent emotional FOMO trades and late reactions to market pumps.
No hype decisions—you set the rules, the agent executes automatically on your terms.
Set a single trading rule now and run it for 24 hours on live crypto data.
